text: my cousin's wedding dj played the cha cha slide 4 times and nobody stopped him
i have 14 active subscriptions and i use maybe 2 of them
my cat knocked my coffee off the desk and stared at me like i deserved it
went on vacation and got food poisoning on day one. ate crackers for a week in cancun
landlord said he'd fix the sink in march. its been 3 marches
seasonal depression hit early this year like it had somewhere to be
the mcflurry machine was working and i didnt know how to act
i rehearse saying 'here' during attendance and still mess it up
my dog ate an entire stick of butter and looked proud
wedding photographer got drunk and all our pics are blurry. we look happy tho
i pay for a gym membership as a donation to the building at this point
my landlord painted over a wasp nest instead of removing it
tried to cancel one subscription and accidentally signed up for two more
the silence after someone says 'lets go around and share a fun fact' is deafening
vacation day 3 my kid threw my phone in the hotel pool. fun
wendy's twitter is funnier than most comedians and that bothers me
my pet fish died and my roommate flushed it before i could say goodbye
november hit and i just became a blanket with legs
the bride asked me to change my outfit at the door. i was wearing khakis
i have mass emails from 2019 i will never open but also never delete
my cat learned to open doors and now i have no privacy
went to an all inclusive resort and got food from the gas station across the street
landlord texted 'coming over in 5' at 11pm on a tuesday like thats normal
chick fil a employees are so nice it makes me nervous
my best mans speech was just him roasting me for 9 minutes straight
signed up for a free trial forgot about it and now i own a meditation app apparently
the winter sun sets at like 4pm and takes my will to live with it
my hamster escaped and we found him living in the couch for 3 days
i put 'be there in 5' and hadnt even gotten out of bed yet
taco bell at 2am hits different but so does the regret at 6am
our wedding cake melted because the venue had no ac in july
i pay for spotify hulu disney+ netflix and still watch youtube
my landlord charges me for 'hallway maintenance' theres no hallway
accidentally said 'love you' to my dentist when leaving
got a sunburn on a cloudy day at the beach. the sun is a liar
my parrot learned to mimic my alarm and now mornings are chaos
february is just january's dlc and i didnt ask for it
five guys is amazing but my wallet needs therapy after
the flower girl at my wedding threw petals at peoples faces like weapons
i have 47 open browser tabs and closing them feels like loss
my dog howls at the roomba every single day like its new information
booked an airbnb that looked nothing like the photos. classic
landlord said the black mold adds character to the apartment
i wave back at people who werent waving at me at least twice a week
popeyes chicken sandwich started wars and honestly i get it
my ring bearer was a dog and he ate the pillow halfway down the aisle
unsubscribed from an email list and they sent 3 emails about it
march is just winter pretending to be spring and i fall for it every year
my cat sits on my keyboard during meetings like shes the project manager
lost my luggage on a domestic flight. it went international without me
the elevator silence with a stranger is where i store my anxiety
in n out is overhyped and im tired of pretending otherwise
my landlord replaced the broken heater with a space heater and called it an upgrade
wedding dj played cotton eye joe and grandma went OFF
i still get mail for someone who moved out in 2014
my gecko escaped and i found him vibing on the shower curtain rod
the sun came out for one day in february and i mass texted everyone like it was news
dominos tracker says my pizza is on the way but its been 84 years
maid of honor tripped going up the stairs and took the bridesmaids with her
signed up for a free newspaper trial and now they call me every week
january feels like it lasts 97 days and im not being dramatic
my rabbit chewed through my laptop charger during finals week
went to the beach and a seagull stole my entire sandwich out of my hand
i hold the door for people who are too far away and then we both suffer
mcdonalds breakfast ending at 1030 is a human rights issue
my landlord hung a 'live laugh love' sign in the laundry room with no working machines
the groom forgot the brides name during vows. her name is sarah. SARAH
i have 6 streaming services and nothing to watch every single night
my turtle knocked over his water bowl looked at me and did it again
booked a window seat on the plane. window was between seats. technically correct i guess
the awkward moment when you and a stranger walk the same direction after saying bye
arbys existing is proof that someone out there believes in something
the apartment above me has a bowling alley apparently based on the sounds at midnight
flower girl refused to walk and had to be carried. she was right honestly
cancelled a free trial with 1 hour left and felt like a heist movie
seasonal depression and regular depression doing a collab this winter
my bird learned to say 'alexa' and now the lights go crazy all day
packed 5 outfits for a 2 day trip and still wore the same thing both days
said 'you too' when the waiter said enjoy your meal. classic me
raising canes sauce carries the entire menu and we all know it
landlord said no pets then i saw him walking a cat on a leash in the hallway
the groom's mom wore white to the wedding and chaos ensued
i autopay everything and have no idea where my money goes
my dog stepped on my face at 3am and then fell asleep on my pillow
got lost on a cruise ship for 45 minutes. its a boat. how
accidentally left myself on mute for a whole presentation. nobody noticed
sonic ice is elite and i will not be taking further questions
the radiator in my apartment has two settings: off and surface of the sun
best man lost the rings and used candy rings from the gift shop
i get an email every day from a store i bought one candle from in 2021
its only october and im already emotionally preparing for january
my cat brings me dead bugs like rent and honestly its more than my roommate does
hotel pool was 'temporarily closed' for our entire 5 day stay. temporarily
i said 'see ya' to a cashier i will absolutely never see again
chipotle guac being extra is my villain origin story
my landlord sends rent reminders at 11:59pm on the last day of the month
caught the bouquet at a wedding and my ex was standing right there
free trial asked for my credit card info and i closed the tab so fast
the darkness at 5pm in december is a personal attack on my motivation
went snorkeling on vacation and swallowed half the ocean immediately
